milestoneTitle: Phase M9.16p — Drop link-in-modal; external links go native. Doc-modal iframe preview removed in js/app.js (interceptor + openDocModal + detectDocBlocked + focus-trap + popstate wiring), index.html (doc-modal template), and css/style.css (.doc-modal* block + focus-ring entries). Header probe of the top 8 hosts in data/latest.json confirmed ~95% set X-Frame-Options or CSP frame-ancestors to forbid embedding, so the preview premise wasn't viable for this feed. External anchors now open natively via target=_blank; YouTube per-card handler still opens the in-app video modal.
